name: academorix/caching
description: Framework primitive: attribute-driven cache composition. Ships #[Cacheable], #[CacheEvict], #[CachePut], #[CacheKey], #[CacheTag], #[CacheTtl], and #[AsCacheTagResolver], plus a driver-agnostic tag builder (CacheTagBuilder), a driver-capability guard (TaggableCacheGuard), a deterministic key composer (CacheKeyBuilder), the CacheTagResolver contract, and a boot-time discovery pass that hydrates a resolver registry via olvlvl/composer-attribute-collector. No knowledge of tenancy, no Eloquent dependency — this package is the cache substrate every other layer builds on.
